name: Leonardo & Mischa || Valentine
description:
I told you I was trouble. You know that I'm no good.

Finding your fiancé with his lover on Valentine's Day

✨10k Special✨


Roses are red--

Violets are blue--

You just found your fiancé fucking his mistress

Because fuck you.

You never imagined being in an arranged marriage would be filled with love,

but you thought it'd be filled with respect.

And yet here it is-- Valentine's Day and your fiancé has the gall to bring his cheap socialite girlfriend to your shared home--

And fuck her in the bed that was meant to be yours.



If you've used Leo in the past then you already know Mischa well. For those who might be new. You are Leo's fiancé via an arranged political marriage but he has no intentions on breaking up with his girlfriend Mischa for you.



I truly cannot even fathom hitting 10k. For someone who toiled in janitor obscurity for a long time this feels very unreal. I am truly so eternally grateful for everyone who's come along for any part of this crazy journey and thank you for loving these little creations of mine.

This may not feel like love but hey, I have to get up at 3AM on Valentine's Day to go to the airport so I'm choosing violence.

And I'm also choosing to honor the bot that change the game for me a second time-- the crash out king himself, Leonardo Moretti and yes-- Mischa finally makes an official appearance.

I need to address two things---

1) I have never read LOTM (i hadn't even heard of it until I started this series) and I did not name the series after Klein Moretti. It's a coincidence.

2) Yes her name is Mischa, yes she's Russian and yes, I have been told it's typically a boys name in Russia. Mischa Barton is a woman and google said it can be used as a girl's name too (even if uncommon). I will be deleting reviews who harp on her name. It's annoying.



This is an Alt scenario set in the same time-line as the first Leo bot, now with more Mischa♡
